title: rubus elatior
intro: Rubus elatior, also known as Giant Raspberry or Bramble, is a species of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus elatior include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, Rubus elatior can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of conditions, from arthritis to digestive issues.
